message:
test(layout): add comprehensive NativeFile layout test suite (bd-9chy.46)

Add glibc-version-matrix coverage for NativeFile layout tests including:
- Field offset/size validation for all 24 _IO_FILE fields
- Alignment checks (8-byte struct, 8-byte pointer fields)
- ABI safety tests (magic bytes, sentinels, lock structure)
- Edge cases (overflow guards, padding, null safety)
- Regression tests for specific field positions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
